title: nileca
description: Hide your armour to show your skin!
body:
Small mod to change individual players' armour visibility. Purely cosmetic.
Current features:
  • "/nileca set playerSelector all|head|torso|leggings|boots true|false" to set the armour visibility of players
  • "/nileca list playerSelector" to list the armour visibility of the players in chat
  • A text config file is used to control the command permissions. The path to the file is ".minecraft/config/nileca" (it has no extension). The first line contains an integer specifying the minimum permission level to use the nileca commands. It defaults to 4 if the file is not found (server op iirc).
  • Armour visibility is saved between sessions (world loads).

Roadmap:
  • Better config: expected by October 2023

Since this mod is so simple, I plan to keep updating it.
HUGE thanks to CCA, the fabric team and the mixin team!
